caption: Lila's sunlit shoot on a breezy urban rooftop terrace feels effortless and breezy, capturing her radiant beauty in a vibrant teal sundress that drapes her curves and highlights her confidence. The high‑heel wedge she always wears elevates her poise, while the golden hour bathes her skin and the city skyline blurs into a soft backdrop. 🌞💃🏙️ #fashion #travel #lifestyle #sundress #photography
